title: TX-130T fighter tank
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{RepulsorliftVehicle |image=[[File:IFT-T.jpg]] |name=TX-130T fighter tank |designer= |manufacturer=*[[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana Heavy Engineering]][[Star Wars Battlefront II: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront II'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]] |line=[[Saber-class assault tank|''Saber''-class assault tank]] |model=TX-130T |type=[[Repulsorcraft/Legends|Repulsorcraft]] [[Tank/Legends|tank]] |cost=42,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] (34,000 used)''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' |modifier= |sysmods= |length=8.2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height=2.3 meters |mass= |max accel= |speed=193 [[Kilometer/Legends|km]]/[[Standard hour/Legends|h]] |max alt= |maneuverability= |engine= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*Dual heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turret *[[Beam cannon turret/Legends|Beam cannon turret]] *Dual computer-guided [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]] (1) **[[Thermal detonator/Legends|Thermal detonators]] **[[Concussion missile/Legends|Concussion missiles]]: 8 |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=*[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (1) *[[Gunner/Legends|Gunner]] (1) |skeleton= |passengers=5 |capacity=100 kg |cargohandling= |consumables=1 day |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability=Military |role=*[[Infantry/Legends|Infantry]] support[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *Anti-vehicle |firstuse=C. [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' places its development at the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' places in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. |retired= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/sourcearchive/news20090512.html|text=The Battle of Turak IV|int=The Battle of Turak IV}} }} The '''TX-130T fighter tank''', also known as the '''IFT-T''', was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Hovertank/Legends|combat assault tank]] manufactured by [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana Heavy Engineering]]. ==Description== [[File:Rep_Vehicle_sizes.jpg|thumb|left|Size comparison of an [[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|HAVw A6 Juggernaut]], [[LAVr QH-7 Chariot|Chariot LAV]] and a TX-130T.]] The 8.2 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long TX-130T was an upgraded version of the [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]] [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], faster than its speed of 193 km/hour, making it faster and more agile. It was crewed by a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]]. It was also categorized as the IFT-T. The [[Tank/Legends|tank]] had a capacity of 100 kilograms of cargo, carried supplies for one day of operation, and had room for up to five passengers. It was armed with a single top-mounted [[Beam cannon turret/Legends|beam cannon turret]], two heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] on either side of the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], and a pair of computer-guided [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]] along the hull. The launchers fired [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] or [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], with a payload of eight missiles. The top cannon's gunner lacked shielding around most of his body, allowing enemy [[Sniper/Legends|snipers]] to easily target a stationary vehicle and kill the gunner.''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' The TX-130T was used to support [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] assaults and was also used in an anti-armor role. It also saw use as a fast raider or as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]]. One cost 42,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] new, and 34,000 credits used. ==History==
[[File:TX-tank.jpg|thumb|Two TX-130Ts during the [[Cleansing of New Plympto|Battle of]] [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]].]]
The first units were deployed towards the end of the Clone Wars in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], but the tank model would be best known for its use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] before and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The tank saw action on various planets and battlefields such as [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], and [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. When [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] were present in battle, the tank escorted the larger [[Walker/Legends|walkers]]. [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] planners attempted to remove the TX-130T from service during the rise of the Empire, but few other models had proven as useful in rooting out insurgents. These vehicles were used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces during the [[Battle of Turak IV]]. ==Behind the scenes== The TX-130T first appeared in the Star Wars: the Clone Wars video game, and in the [[Star Wars Battlefront (series)|''Battlefront'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series as an Imperial vehicle. It was a re-skinned Republic TX-130S. The tank has since appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere]]'' comic story arc. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' *''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' *[[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] *[[Purge – The Tyrant's Fist 1|''Purge – The Tyrant's Fist'' 1]] *''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Imperial Ace]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars Battlefront II: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront II'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|IFT-T}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/sourcearchive/news20090512.html|text=The Battle of Turak IV|int=The Battle of Turak IV}} *''[[Galaxy at War]]'' *{{DB|vehicle|tx130tank|Saber-class fighter tank}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=TX-130T Kampfpanzer |es=Tanque de asalto TX-130T |hu=TX-130T tank |uk=Штурмовий танк TX-130T }} [[Category:Saber-class assault tank models]] [[Category:Vehicle classes of the Galactic Empire]]
